# Aurora Marine Installation ASA — IPO Term Extraction

| # | Field | Value | Source / Section |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Issuer | Aurora Marine Installation ASA, a Norwegian public limited liability company | Indicative Terms table |
| 2 | Instrument type | IPO of ordinary shares (combined primary and secondary offering); par value NOK 1.00 | Indicative Terms — "Instrument" / "Offering structure" |
| 3 | Offering size — Primary | NOK 2,400,000,000 (before greenshoe) | Indicative Terms — "Primary offering size" |
| 3b | Offering size — Secondary | Up to 18,000,000 existing shares from Selling Shareholder (Aurora Marine Holding S.à r.l.); ~NOK 1,420m at mid-point after costs | Indicative Terms — "Secondary offering size"; Use of Proceeds |
| 4 | Greenshoe / over-allotment | Up to 15% of the offered shares; exercisable by Stabilisation Manager within 30 calendar days of first day of trading | Indicative Terms — "Greenshoe / over-allotment option"; Stabilisation section |
| 5 | Price range / final price | Indicative range NOK 88 – NOK 105 per share (final price set at end of bookbuilding) | Indicative Terms — "Indicative price range" / "Pricing date" |
| 6 | Listing exchange | Oslo Børs (Main List), Industrials segment | Indicative Terms — "Listing" |
| 6b | Ticker | NOT STATED (ISIN given as NO0010XXXXXX; no ticker symbol provided) | Indicative Terms — "ISIN" |
| 7 | Distribution format | Book-built offering: (i) QIIs in Norway and select EEA jurisdictions, (ii) QIBs in the U.S. under Rule 144A, (iii) Norwegian retail tranche (~10%) | Indicative Terms — "Offering structure" (second row) |
| 8 | Underwriter syndicate (top 3) | NOT STATED — Joint Global Coordinators, Joint Bookrunners, Stabilisation Manager and Co-Lead Manager all listed as "to be named" | Indicative Terms — JGC / JBR / Stab Mgr rows |
| 9 | Lock-up — Issuer | 180 days from settlement (carve-out: new issuance / share-based incentives up to 1% of post-IPO shares) | Lock-up arrangements table |
| 9b | Lock-up — Selling Shareholder | 180 days primary lock-up; 360 days extended lock-up on residual stake; release events require JGC consent | Lock-up arrangements table |
| 9c | Lock-up — Management & Board | 360 days from settlement (standard tax-funding release) | Lock-up arrangements table |
| 9d | Lock-up — Cornerstones | 180 days from settlement | Cornerstone investors section / Lock-up table |
| 10 | Use of proceeds | Net primary proceeds (~NOK 2,310m) applied to fleet expansion capex (~NOK 1,500m for two newbuild vessels), ~NOK 600m senior secured debt repayment, and general corporate purposes; Issuer receives no secondary proceeds. | Use of Proceeds section |
| 11 | Convertible terms (coupon, conversion premium, conversion rate, fundamental change) | NOT APPLICABLE — instrument is ordinary shares, not a convertible | Indicative Terms — "Instrument" |
| 12 | Cornerstone investors | Aggregate ~NOK 1.2bn: Storebrand AM ~NOK 400m; Folketrygdfondet ~NOK 350m; Nordic specialist sustainable-infrastructure fund ~NOK 250m; Norwegian pension fund ~NOK 200m (all illustrative; subject to min. free float and JGC scale-back) | Cornerstone investors section |
| 13 | Governing law | Norwegian law | Indicative Terms — "Governing law" |

### Additional notes (not in requested fields, retained from source for completeness)
- **Implied market cap (mid-point):** ~NOK 14.0bn post-money, fully diluted (Indicative Terms).
- **Implied EV (mid-point):** ~NOK 16.5bn (Indicative Terms).
- **Settlement:** T+2, DvP via VPS; shares registered/dematerialised (Indicative Terms).
- **Stabilisation regime:** EU MAR (Reg. 596/2014) and Norwegian regulations; up to 30 calendar days (Stabilisation section).
- **Dividend policy:** 30–50% of consolidated net income from FY2026, subject to <2.5x net debt/EBITDA (Governance section).

**Caveat:** The document is explicitly labelled a synthetic / fictional term sheet for paper demonstration; figures and parties (including "illustrative" cornerstones) should not be treated as binding or representative of any real transaction.

| 18 | Investor put | Year-3 put on 22 October 2029 at 100% of principal plus accrued interest | "Investor put on year 3" section |
| 19 | Issuer optional redemption | After 22 October 2028 at 100% of principal plus accrued interest, subject to 130%-of-conversion-price trading test (20 of 30 trading days); make-whole premium available on conversion in lieu of redemption | "Optional redemption by the Issuer" section |
| 20 | Capped call | Strike at initial conversion price USD 37.63; cap ~75% above reference share price (~USD 49.70); ~USD 28m premium | "Capped call transactions" section |
| 21 | Cornerstone investors | NOT STATED | — |
| 22 | Governing law | New York law | Indicative Terms table |
| 23 | Trustee | NOT STATED ("globally recognised institutional trustee — to be named") | Indicative Terms table |
| 24 | Form / denominations | Global notes via DTC; USD 1,000 denominations and increments | Indicative Terms table |
| 25 | Tenor / maturity | 5 years; maturity 22 October 2031 (NC2 issuer call; year-3 investor put) | Indicative Terms table |

# Reddit, Inc. IPO – Commercial Terms Summary

| Term | Value | Source / Citation |
|---|---|---|
| Issuer | Reddit, Inc. | Cover page |
| Instrument type | IPO – Class A common stock | Cover page ("This is our initial public offering") |
| Offering size (total) | 22,000,000 shares at $34.00 = $748,000,000 | Cover page (Price to Public table) |
| — Primary (issuer) | 15,276,527 shares; proceeds to Reddit $493,431,822 | Cover page |
| — Secondary (selling stockholders) | 6,723,473 shares; proceeds to selling stockholders $217,168,178 | Cover page |
| Greenshoe / over-allotment | Up to 3,300,000 additional shares from the company (issuer only) | Cover page |
| Price range / final price | Final price: $34.00 per share | Cover page ("PRICE $34.00 A SHARE") |
| Listing exchange and ticker | New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), ticker "RDDT" | Cover page |
| Distribution format | Registered public offering (Rule 424(b)(4); Reg. No. 333-277256) | Cover page header |
| Underwriter syndicate (top 3) | Morgan Stanley; Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC; J.P. Morgan | Cover page (lead underwriters listed) |
| Lock-up period | NOT STATED (in provided excerpt) | — |
| Use of proceeds | NOT STATED in detail in provided excerpt (Use of Proceeds section referenced on p. 83 but content not included) | TOC p. 83 |
| Convertible terms (coupon, conversion premium, conversion rate, fundamental change) | N/A – not a convertible offering | Cover page |
| Cornerstone investors | NOT STATED. (Directed share program reserved up to 1,760,000 shares (~8%) for eligible users/moderators, certain directors, and friends/family — not cornerstone investors) | Cover page (Directed Share Program) |
| Listing exchange ticker | "RDDT" on NYSE | Cover page |
| Governing law | NOT STATED (in provided excerpt) | — |

### Additional notable items disclosed
- **Underwriting discount:** $1.70 per share; total $37,400,000 (Cover page).
- **Settlement / closing date:** March 25, 2024 (Cover page).
- **Prospectus dated:** March 20, 2024 (Cover page).
- **Share class structure:** Three classes — Class A (1 vote), Class B (10 votes, convertible 1:1 into Class A), Class C (no votes); Class B holders ~97.1% voting power post-IPO (Cover page).
- **Emerging growth company status:** Yes (Cover page).
- **Community / mission reservation:** ~1% of common stock reserved to fund community-related programs (Letter from Co-Founder, p. ii).
- **Full underwriter syndicate listed:** Morgan Stanley; Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC; J.P. Morgan; BofA Securities; Citigroup; Deutsche Bank Securities; MUFG; Citizens JMP; Needham & Company; Piper Sandler; Raymond James; Academy Securities; Loop Capital Markets; Ramirez & Co., Inc.; Telsey Advisory Group (Cover page).

**Note:** Several items (lock-up period, detailed use of proceeds, governing law, cornerstone investors) are not present in the excerpt provided. They may appear in the "Underwriters," "Use of Proceeds," or "Description of Capital Stock" sections of the full prospectus, which were not included in the document text supplied.

Change of Control Triggering Event repurchase mechanic disclosed; Special Optional Redemption upon Transaction Termination Event also disclosed. | Cover page; "Description of Notes—Optional Redemption," "Special Optional Redemption upon a Transaction Termination Event," "Purchase of Notes Upon a Change of Control Triggering Event" |

- **Interest payment frequency**: Semi-annual in arrears for all tranches; first interest payment date in 2025. (Cover page)

**Caveat**: This is a preliminary prospectus supplement "subject to completion" dated December 9, 2024. Principal amounts, coupons, prices, maturity dates and the final underwriter list are blank placeholders in the document provided and will be set at pricing.

# EchoStar Corporation – Offering Term Sheet

| Field | Value | Source / Page |
|---|---|---|
| Issuer | EchoStar Corporation (Nevada corporation) | Cover page; "About this Prospectus Supplement" S-1 |
| Instrument type | Registered direct offering of two series of debt: (i) 10.75% Senior Secured Notes due 2029 ("New Senior Spectrum Secured Notes") and (ii) 3.875% Convertible Senior Secured Notes due 2030 ("EchoStar Convertible Notes") | Cover page |
| Offering size | $5,355,999,854 aggregate principal of 10.75% Senior Secured Notes due 2029 (offering price $985.522167 per $1,000 = $5,200,000,000 gross) + $29,999,993 aggregate principal of 3.875% Convertible Senior Secured Notes due 2030. Total proceeds to issuer: $5,229,999,993 | Cover page (pricing table) |
| Greenshoe / over-allotment | NOT STATED (registered direct placement; no over-allotment disclosed) | Cover page |
| Price range / final price | 10.75% Notes: $985.522167 per $1,000 principal. 3.875% Convertible Notes: $1,000 per $1,000 principal (par). Reference Class A common stock last sale: $26.07 (Nov. 7, 2024) | Cover page pricing table |
| Listing exchange & ticker | The Notes will NOT be listed on any exchange. Underlying Class A Common Stock listed on Nasdaq Global Select Market under "SATS" | Cover page |
| Distribution format | Registered direct offering pursuant to Rule 424(b)(5) under Form S-3 shelf (Reg. No. 333-276368); sold pursuant to Securities Purchase Agreements dated Nov. 8, 2024 | Cover page; "About this Prospectus Supplement" S-1 |
| Underwriter syndicate | No underwriters; Houlihan Lokey Capital, Inc. retained as sole placement agent | Cover page |
| Lock-up period | NOT STATED | — |
| Use of proceeds | Proceeds (together with the EchoStar Exchange Offers) intended to fund repayment/refinancing of existing DISH indebtedness and for general corporate purposes in connection with the DISH Transactions (See "Use of Proceeds," S-39) | TOC reference S-39; Recent Developments S-3–S-5 |
| Convertible – coupon | 3.875% per annum; first four coupons payable, at issuer's option, in cash or in kind (PIK restrictions apply); cash thereafter; semi-annual May 30 / Nov 30, beginning May 30, 2025 | Cover page |
| Convertible – conversion premium | 35% premium to Initial VWAP of $24.91135 per share of Class A Common Stock | Cover page |
| Convertible – conversion rate | 29.73507 shares of Class A Common Stock per $1,000 principal amount (initial); subject to customary adjustments | Cover page |
| Convertible – settlement | Cash up to principal amount; remainder in cash, Class A shares, or combination at issuer's election | Cover page |
| Convertible – fundamental change mechanism | Conversion rate may be adjusted in connection with conversions made following a fundamental change or a redemption notice, as set forth in the EchoStar Convertible Notes Indenture | Cover page (full mechanics in "Description of EchoStar Convertible Notes," S-74; specific FC details NOT STATED in excerpt provided) |
| Cornerstone / anchor investors | Commitment Agreement with "Commitment Parties" (certain Consenting Creditors plus an affiliate of Chairman Charles W. Ergen) committing to purchase/backstop $5.356 billion of New Senior Spectrum Secured Notes (incl. $156M PIK discounts/premiums). Ergen-affiliated party committed $100M (subsequently $5M assigned to CEO Hamid Akhavan) | "Recent Developments – Commitment Agreement," S-4 |
| Listing exchange ticker | Nasdaq: "SATS" (Class A Common Stock only; Notes not listed) | Cover page |
| Governing law | NOT STATED in the excerpt provided (typically New York law for Indenture; not specified in supplied text) | — |

### Additional notes
- Maturity: 10.75% Notes mature Nov. 30, 2029; Convertible Notes mature Nov. 30, 2030. (Cover page)
- Collateral: Both series secured equally and ratably (via guarantees) by first-priority liens on AWS-3 and AWS-4 spectrum licenses, proceeds thereof, and equity pledges of Spectrum Assets Guarantors; 700 MHz, H Block and CBRS Licenses are excluded. (Cover page; S-3)
- Trustee / Collateral Agent: The Bank of New York Mellon Trust Company, N.A. (Cover page)
- Conditionality: Offering is conducted concurrently with EchoStar Exchange Offers; closing of one is conditioned on the other (S-5).
